subject: Biology
chapter: Strategies for Enhancement in Food Production

remember: Students will be able to recall and identify different strategies for enhancement in food production.
Students will be able to describe the major components of the green revolution.
understand: Students will be able to explain the causes and consequences of the green revolution.
Students will be able to understand the importance of high-yielding varieties, irrigation, fertilizers, and pesticides in enhancing food production.
apply: Students will be able to apply the strategies for enhancement in food production to different crops and agroclimatic conditions.
Students will be able to evaluate the benefits and limitations of different strategies for enhancement in food production.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of the green revolution on the environment and society.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of biotechnology in enhancing food production and its potential applications.

ncert_objectives: To explain the green revolution and its impact on Indian agriculture.
To describe the strategies for enhancement in food production and their importance.
To discuss the limitations and challenges of the green revolution and strategies for sustainable food production.
board_exam_objectives: To recall and explain the major components of the green revolution.
To describe the strategies for enhancement in food production and their importance.
To evaluate the impact of the green revolution on the environment and society.
